title: Create: Goggle Placement
description: Configure the Placement of Goggles when using the Curios/Trinkets slot.
body:
# Create: Goggle Placement

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/strip/lol.png)

[![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.com/invite/sA42pp6cuX)
[![youtube](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/youtube.svg)](https://www.youtube.com/@lieonlion?sub_confirmation=1)
[![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/LieOnLion/Create-Goggle-Placement)
[![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/LieOnLion)
[![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/lieonlion)
[![patreon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/patreon.svg)](https://www.patreon.com/LieOnLion)

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/strip/lol.png)

[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/a-creation-by-lieon-studio.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios)

Create: Goggle Placement is a configuration mod to tweak how the Create Goggles are palced on your head while using the [Curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) / [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) slot. This is a purely visual mod, designed to be client side only (Using the config will also effect the Placement on other players).

## Main Features

- Disable the Goggles moving down when wearing a Helmet (great when hiding armour).
- Move the Goggles further up or down.
- Flip Goggles upsidedown.
- Disable the Goggles from being Rendered.

This mod was originally thought of and designed to fix the issue of the Goggles covering your face when wearing a Helmet. The idea came to me while watching youtubers taking off their Helmets when using invisible armour as the Goggles blocked their Skin's face.

![Config System](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e453191bee9ba3ce382e5d1faf60e11541b356d7.png)

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/strip/lol.png)

[**![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/banners/bisect-banner-spruce-chest.png)**](https://bisect.lieonlion.dev)
